name: @harness/log-retention
description: ISSUE-077 — the C7 observability backbone above the ISSUE-011 skeleton: three-sink retention + compliance redaction-tombstone (event_log/guardrail_log; config_audit_log is ISSUE-010), the client-presentable all-or-nothing guardrail_log export (PERM-gated), the mgmt-plane read side (health-reporter allow-list, independent-heartbeat server-authoritative staleness evaluator [AF-118/AF-120], health grid + cross-deployment alerts + backup-health + cost overview contracts), the five RBAC-gated dashboard data contracts (panel->producer map, answer-mode pill, mobile push routing), and the feedback-flywheel + benchmarking substrate. Built with the house port+fake pattern; the live pg adapter (supabase-store.ts) is authored to the ISSUE-008 0001 DDL, NOT run in this offline half. The Supabase Management API backup-health read (ADR-008) is stubbed offline.
